Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Doctor Nova]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 6''' — Doctor Nova is a character mentioned by Mell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 8''' — Starhammer visited Doctor Nova.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 11''' — Doctor Nova is a wanted fugitive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 16''' — The narrator was Doctor Nova’s partner in an alternate life.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 31''' — Doctor Nova has been kidnapped.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 32''' — Doctor Nova is the creator of a specific design for Nova-Bots featuring a single red light in their visors.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 33''' — Doctor Nova was targeted by someone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 35''' — Doctor Nova is an Aether Technician who was held in custody by the Advocates.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 35''' — Doctor Nova is also known as Mell D-One-Twenty-Five.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 40''' — Doctor Nova was present during the first activation of Starhammer's Evolution Engine.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 47''' — Doctor Nova is Mell's voice and an Archmage of sealing and binding.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 49''' — Doctor Nova and Spellbinder were legendary criminals throughout the galaxy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 51''' — Doctor Nova is a person whose location is unknown.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 52''' — Doctor Nova made Starhammer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 54''' — Doctor Nova is known for her ability to deceive.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 4''' — Doctor Nova is a persona or title used by Mell.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
